docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $600.00 FILED BY MEDINA BALTAZAR AS TO DEFENDANT MOLINA ARMANDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-01-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
